raw_consumer_statement: I noticed on my credit account statement for {$460.00} for XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX, used on XX/XX/scrub>XXXX XXXX XXXX I have never received that service. I immediately notified my Citi Rewards credit card company and they said they will look into the matter and will credit my account in the meantime. I reached out to XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX to gain information as to who the person was who stole my credit card information and fraudulently used my card ; however XXXX XXXX XXXX was unable to relay any information at all. At that time, I had locked my card while Citi stated they will issue a new card. In the next day or so, I was notified by Citi a declined purchase by an unknown store ( I can't remember the name of the merchant ). It was for an amount for over a {$1000.00}. I was extremely glad it got denied for someone was attempting to use my card again! Now suddenly I have the XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX  charge of {$460.00} for XXXX, stating it has been reversed as investigation was completed. I called Citi stating I never used that merchant ; however now they say I never replied back with my dispute ( a letter they claim they sent me, which I never received ). I called multiple times again ; however, they still state it is a valid purchase. I believe the investigation on their part was poor as I am still being charged for this amount. Please assist in any way, thank you.
